data.title: Valaris Just Scored $447 Million Petrobras Backlog Boost
data.description: Valaris Limited (NYSE: VAL) recently announced a significant 1,064-day contract extension with Petrobras (NYSE: PBR) for the drillship VALARIS DS-4. This extension is set to begin in November 2027 and is anticipated to contribute around $447 million to Valaris' contract backlog. Additionally, the company has made adjustments to the day rate for the existing contract, resulting in a decrease of approximately $21 million in the backlog from April 2026 onwards. Despite this positive news, Valaris stock is currently experiencing a decline in value, prompting speculation on the reasons behind this situation.

data.title: UFP Industries Expands Deckorators® Composite Decking Capacity Through Acquisition
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan on April 6, 2026, UFP Industries revealed the purchase of Oldcastle APG's MoistureShield decking operating assets. This move marks a strategic decision to enhance Deckorators® wood-plastic composite (WPC) decking capacity. The acquisition is expected to have a substantial impact on the company's operations and growth.

data.title: Bitmine Buys 71,252 Ethereum As BMNR Stock Uplists To NYSE
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies, trading on NYSE under BMNR, saw a significant 7.5% surge in stock price to reach $20.91 following their purchase of 71,252 ETH last week. This acquisition marked their fastest pace since December. Their uplisting to NYSE on April 9 added to the positive momentum. Chairman Tom Lee of Accumulation Blitz characterized the purchase as a bullish move, indicating a belief that Ethereum is nearing the end of a "mini-crypto winter." Bitmine now holds a total of $11.4 billion in crypto and cash, with $864 million in cash, 198 BTC, and interests in Beast Industries and Eightco Holdings (NASDAQ: ORBS). The ORBS investment provides Bitmine with exposure to OpenAI, making it one of the few publicly listed companies with this advantage. With a 3.98% ownership of Ethereum's circulating supply of 120.7 million, Bitmine is close to achieving its target of accumulating 5% ("Alchemy of 5%") in just nine months, currently at 79% of that goal. data.title: Bitcoin's Rally Close To $70,000 May Be A Bull Trap, Analyst Warns
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is currently trading under a crucial resistance area, leading to worries that the recent price stability might be concealing underlying risks linked to the advanced stage of the economy. According to renowned analyst Benjamin Cowen, there are clear signs of a late-cycle warning indicating that retail investors could be becoming excessively optimistic, neglecting the macroeconomic pressures in play, such as enduring inflation, a deteriorating job market, and escalating geopolitical conflicts. Cowen highlighted that in late stages of the economic cycle, bear markets often exhibit misleading price movements, with sideways or slightly bullish trends on minimal trading volume, potentially tricking traders into thinking the market downturn has concluded before another steep drop occurs. For further information, check out the detailed account on Benzinga.com.
